post.description: Method: POST. Path: /api/v1/payments/checkout. Headers: Authorization: Bearer <access-token>, idempotency-key: <unique-key>. Body: amount (positive number, max 2 decimals), currency (3-letter ISO code). Side effects: creates a pending payment row in the database and calls the configured payment service abstraction for checkout processing.

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Client-generated unique key used to enforce request idempotency.

400.description:
Request body validation failed.

Invalid request body or missing idempotency-key header.

401.description: Missing or invalid JWT access token.

403.description: Authenticated user is not allowed by policy to create checkout.

404.description: Authenticated user does not exist anymore.

example.message: User with id 41d2f0f8-b4ce-4f11-8c6f-7fdd2b63e4b6 is not found

500.description:
Unexpected server error.

Provider processing or unexpected internal failure.

example.message: Unable to process payment with provider

get.description: Retrieve a CV using its public slug. No authentication required.

404.description: CV with this slug not found

post.description: Create a new CV for the authenticated user. Slug is auto-generated.

get.description: Retrieve all CVs belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Atomically create a CV and all its sections from a sessionStorage payload. Both CV and sections are persisted in a single transaction.

get.description: Retrieve a specific CV by its ID. User must own the CV.

403.description: You do not own this CV

patch.description: Update the title of a CV. User must own the CV.

403.description: You do not own this CV

delete.description: Delete a CV and all its sections. User must own the CV.

403.description: You do not own this CV

get.description: Retrieve all sections for a specific CV, sorted by order index.

403.description: You do not own this CV

404.description: CV not found or not owned by user

post.description: Create a new section within a CV. Order index is auto-assigned.

403.description: You do not own this CV

404.description: CV not found or not owned by user

get.description: Retrieve a specific section by its ID.

403.description: You do not own this CV

patch.description: Update the content of a section.

403.description: You do not own this CV

delete.description: Delete a section. Subsequent sections are reindexed automatically.

403.description: You do not own this CV

post.description: Move a section up or down within the CV by swapping with its neighbor.

200.description: Section moved successfully; returns both swapped sections

400.description: Cannot move (already first/last section) or invalid direction

403.description: You do not own this CV
